title: Elements of Beta
description: Elements of Beta is a totally normal datapack that brings features from Beta 1.7.3 into modern versions, such as: no hunger, no sprinting, no experience, and the classic UI of old Minecraft.
body:
# Elements of Beta
### Please read the entire page so that you do not miss any key information that may impact your experience.

### THIS ADDS CUSTOM CONTENT
The datapack [Purely Beta](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purely-beta), focuses solely on recreating Vanilla beta. Stay tuned! As of EOB 1.8, you can still disable custom content features using:

`/scoreboard players allowthirddimension eobmain_globalconfig 0`

1.2.1 Video (legacy) (latest is 1.8)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FO3EbWm75pE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
1.0.1 Video (legacy)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/LEzbvXU9UeU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Elements of Beta** ("EOB") is a datapack and resource pack that brings Elements of Beta to modern Minecraft servers. EOB also adds __custom content__ which must be found in the ??? dimension. *With no mods!*

***The EOB datapack must be used with EOB Assets.***

## Major Changes: (As of 1.8)
- Experience and hunger removed
- Attack delay removed
- Beta 1.7.3 Food System
- Sprinting removed
- Golden Days and Beta Recipes are integrated within EOB. Using the plugin **OldGenerator** is heavily recommended.
- **End removed...?**
- EOB Filter: all modern blocks, mobs, items, and recipes are removed.
- Sand and Gravel duping (like Beta)
- Slab and (simple) wool Transmutation
- Blockstate checker (e.g. upside-down stairs)
- _Look at the Changelog page._

## EOB is used best in tandem with other mods/datapacks/plugins that emulate Beta minecraft.
Here's the best ones:
- _OldGenerator plugin or modified version of Such_
- **Nostalgic Tweaks**

## EOB datapacks may be incompatible with:
(NT = nostalgic tweaks mod)
- NT Prevent hunger **<-- IS incompatible.**
- NT Old Drops **<-- IS incompatible.**
- Modern(er) Beta World Generation (may be configurable to work)
- Other datapacks/mods that affect the datapack's scopes.
- Mods that use the default Heart icon

## Known issues:
- Transmuting beds may cause unstable behavior (if you have allowthirddimension on in the eobmain_globalconfig scoreboard)
- Weak compatibility with Moderner Beta

Any issues? my discord is @optim00se

Dm me! :)
